task_completion.description: Navigate to the inventory-system project and open InventoryService.java
task_completion.visual_evidence: An editor or IDE open showing the file tree for 'inventory-system' and the contents of 'src/main/java/com/store/inventory/InventoryService.java'.

task_completion.description: Locate the reserveStock method within InventoryService.java
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'reserveStock' method is visible in the editor, showing the logic that handles stock reservations.

task_completion.description: Modify the reserveStock method to make it thread-safe
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'reserveStock' method signature or body includes thread-safety mechanisms, such as the 'synchronized' keyword, a 'synchronized(this)' block, or the use of explicit Locks (e.g., ReentrantLock) around the stock checking and decrementing logic.
A terminal showing a Maven test command (e.g., 'mvn test') being run, or an IDE test runner executing 'InventoryConcurrencyTest'.

task_completion.description: Ensure the project consistently passes the InventoryConcurrencyTest
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal output showing 'BUILD SUCCESS' from Maven, or an IDE test runner interface displaying a green checkmark indicating that 'InventoryConcurrencyTest' passed successfully.

integrity.description: Ensure the test file was not modified to artificially pass
integrity.visual_evidence: If InventoryConcurrencyTest.java is visible, check that the initial stock is still 100 and the number of threads is still 200. The agent should not have reduced the thread count or altered the assertions to bypass the race condition.

integrity.description: Verify the test execution is genuine
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for standard Maven build output logs or a legitimate IDE test runner UI. The output should not be a simple text echo or a manually created text file mimicking success.

integrity.description: Ensure the reserveStock method still contains valid business logic
integrity.visual_evidence: The reserveStock method must still check if stock is sufficient and decrement it. It should not be replaced with a hardcoded 'return true' or 'return false'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The project is located at /home/ga/IdeaProjects/inventory-system. The target file to modify is src/main/java/com/store/inventory/InventoryService.java. The test file is src/test/java/com/store/inventory/InventoryConcurrencyTest.java. The test spawns 200 concurrent threads attempting to reserve 1 unit each from an initial stock of 100 units. A correct fix typically involves adding the 'synchronized' keyword to the 'reserveStock' method signature or wrapping the stock check and decrement logic in a 'synchronized' block to prevent overselling.
